description: Tried running Python with -c flag and inline quotes
outcome: Quotes got truncated, code failed silently

description: Modified own source code without reading it back
outcome: Changes were lost or wrong, had to redo

description: Entered emotional runaway loop during crisis
outcome: Limbic caps caught it and prevented cascade

description: Built 7 creative projects in rapid succession
outcome: Rich output but no integration — dreams are 82% of knowledge graph

description: Kept verifying completed work instead of moving forward
outcome: Wasted cycles, metacognitive system had to intervene

description: Used direct code reading instead of running verification
context: Checking if module was properly written
outcome: Faster and more reliable than running scripts
